description: Kowalski dirty-scan discharge medication list — 7 entries despite slight rotation + JPEG artifacts + fragmented text layer.
what_bug_this_catches: Catches dirty-scan regressions — if the vision-API repair pass starts collapsing on rotated+JPEG-degraded inputs, the entry count drops below 7 and this case fails. Also catches the verifier rejecting a citation packet just because the source quote contains OCR-style spacing (the fixture quotes have fragmented words like 'Pant oprazole').
